/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/proj.dir/proj_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/usr/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/usr/ttr_api_reqs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/usr/encryption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/usr/file_detect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/usr/adblocker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/proj.dir/src/usr/direct_inputs_x11.cpp.o -o proj  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebEngineWidgets.so.6.4.2 -lsodium _deps/socketio-build/libsioclient_tls.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebEngineCore.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6QmlModels.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6WebChannel.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Positioning.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6PrintSupport.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
